title: feedback_positive_fb_1782396207998_qp9hrf
content:
{"id":"fb_1782396207998_qp9hrf","signal":"positive","context":"Date: 2026-06-25.
Incident: agy-yolo system crashing every 10 minutes due to CPU runaway loop on failed eligibility checks (UNAVAILABLE 503).
Artifacts: ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json, ~/.gemini/config/config.json
Command: /Users/igorganapolsky/.local/bin/agy models < /dev/null
Root Cause: agy CLI was running a background thread/loop checking GetG1Credits at https://daily-cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com (staging server returning 503) due to useAiCredits: true. The watchdogs in agy-yolo-wrapper.js killed it for exceeding 90% CPU.
Fix: Updated config.json and settings.json with useAiCredits: false, useCloudCodeApi: false, use_cloud_code_api: false, and set cloudCodeServerUrl/cloud_code_server_url to https://cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com.
Heuristic: Always redirect stdin from /dev/null (< /dev/null) in non-interactive/scripted calls to agy to prevent indefinite hangs or auth lockups.","submittedContext":"Date: 2026-06-25.

Root Cause: agy CLI was running a background thread/loop checking GetG1Credits at https://daily-cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com (staging server returning 503) due to useAiCredits: true. The watchdogs in agy-yolo-wrapper.js killed it for exceeding 90% CPU.
Fix: Updated config.json and settings.json with useAiCredits: false, useCloudCodeApi: false, use_cloud_code_api: false, and set cloudCodeServerUrl/cloud_code_server_url to https://cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com.
